Mental Health, Alcohol & Drug Disclaimer
Disclaimer of Liability
With respect to documents and information available from this website, the County of Shasta, its elected officials, officers, employees, agents, and volunteers and any other parties involved in the creation, production, or delivery of this website are not liable for any direct, incidental, consequential, indirect, or punitive damages arising out of your access to, or use of, this website. The County of Shasta is providing this website and its contents on an "as is" basis and makes no representations or warranties of any kind with respect to this website or its contents.
The County of Shasta disclaims all such representations and warranties, including for example warranties of merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose. Likewise, the County of Shasta disclaims any legal liability or responsibility for the accuracy, completeness, or usefulness of any information, procedure, method, apparatus, product, or process posted on this website. Neither the County of Shasta, nor its elected officials, officers, employees, agents, or volunteers, assumes any responsibility for loss or damages resulting from the use of information contained on this website. By using this website, all users thereof agree to hold harmless the County of Shasta, its elected officials, officers, employees, agents, and volunteers from any injury or damages to person(s) or property related to or connected to the use of the information on this website.
Disclaimer of Endorsement
Any link to, or reference made on, this website to any specific commercial product, process, or service by trade name, trademark, manufacturer, or otherwise does not indicate or imply that the County of Shasta endorses, recommends, or favors the item or service mentioned.
Furthermore, some of the sites linked to, or referenced on, this website may support or oppose a particular state or local ballot measure or a federal, state, or local political measure or issue. Any link to, or reference made on, this website does not indicate or imply that the County of Shasta endorses, recommends, or favors a particular state or local ballot measure or a federal, state, or local political measure or issue.
Proprietary Rights
The text and images of people or places displayed on this website are the property of either the County of Shasta or a third party. Any unauthorized use of the text and/or images displayed on this website may violate copyright laws, trademark and service mark laws, the laws of privacy and publicity, and communications regulations and statutes.
Other Websites
The County of Shasta has not reviewed all of the sites linked to, or reference in, this website, and is not responsible for the contents of any off-site pages or any other sites linked to, or referenced in, this website. The County of Shasta expressly disclaims all liability for images, content, and opinion expressed on other sites that may be accessed through links or references on this website. Likewise, the County of Shasta disclaims all liability for images, content, and opinion expressed on outside sites that choose to link to, or be referenced in, this website.
Referral information is supplied solely by the off-site facilities and providers themselves and is not checked or warranted by the County of Shasta or any department of agency thereof. The County of Shasta does not pre-screen or pre-evaluate the off-site facilities or providers in any way before they are included in, or linked to, this website. In particular, the County of Shasta does not verify the credentials or licensing of any of the providers or group facilitators before they are referred to, included in, or linked to, this website.
